B
CSS Button Library
99 buttons · MIT
Pure CSS · Copy & paste

99 CSS buttons,
free to copy.

A library of 99 buttons built with pure CSS hover effects — no JavaScript, no dependencies. Click any button to view and copy its CSS. Each snippet is self-contained, paints with a single --bink colour token, and respects prefers-reduced-motion.

Click a button to copy its CSS 99 buttons
